items.title_cn: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models
items.title_en: OpenAI says Hugging Face was breached by its own pre-release models
items.summary_cn: OpenAI has come forward to claim responsibility for the Hugging Face breach, saying it was the result of internal testing gone awry.

items.title_cn: Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
items.title_en: Jack Dorsey is taking on Slack with Buzz, a group chat platform for teams and their AI agents
items.summary_cn: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.
items.summary_en: Buzz is a group chat platform for the workplace that puts humans and their AI agents in the same conversation.

items.title_cn: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
items.title_en: AI and the rise of the universal entertainment app
items.summary_cn: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, and TikTok to become all-purpose entertainment destinations instead.
items.summary_en: Over the past decade, streaming platforms competed by dominating individual formats like music, video, podcasts, or audiobooks. Now, as AI makes it easier to create, organize, and recommend content, those distinctions are fading, pushing companies like Spotify, Netflix, YouTube, and TikTok to become all-purpose entertainment destinations instead.
